_provenance._description: Mark where each populated field came from. Do not mark inferred research/planner fields as user_provided. Planner-generated peers, sources, risks, and research topics belong in artifacts/research_plan.json, not input_card.json.

research_direction._description: Optional controls to steer web research toward higher-quality or domain-specific sources. All fields are optional. Leave empty to start with unrestricted broad discovery, then let the research plan select relevant source_registry packs/domains.
